allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(h['hostelName'], ':', [\(r['roomNumber'], r.get\('occupied',0\), r.get\('bedCount',0\), [b.get\('label','?'\)+':'+str\(b.get\('occupied',False\)\) for b in r.get\('beds',[]\)]\) for r in h.get\('rooms',[]\)]\) for h in d.get\('hostels',[]\)]")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./.data/hostels.json'\); d.hostels.forEach\(h=>{ console.log\(h.hostelName\); h.rooms?.forEach\(r=>{ console.log\('  Room',r.roomNumber,'occupied:',r.occupied,'beds:',r.beds?.map\(b=>b.label+':'+b.occupied\)\); }\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./.data/admin-control.json'\); const owners=d.owners||d; const arr=Array.isArray\(owners\)?owners:Object.values\(owners\); arr.forEach\(o=>{ \(o.hostels||[]\).forEach\(h=>{ console.log\(o.email||o.id, h.hostelName\); h.rooms?.forEach\(r=>{ console.log\('  Room',r.roomNumber,'occupied:',r.occupied,'beds:',JSON.stringify\(r.beds?.map\(b=>\({l:b.label,occ:b.occupied}\)\)\)\); }\); }\); }\);")
